title: I'm Mindful, Now What?
author: Andrew Holecek
description: Meditation can be so much more than 20 minutes of tranquility a day. "With some initial practice," shares Andrew Holecek, "you'll bring a mind that is more present, open, sensitive, kind, and aware into every facet of life. Wherever you go, your wondrous mind will go with you." Mindfulness is everyw
